# CTB Agent Handoff Template

Use this template when moving work from one CTB stage owner to the next.

## Handoff Summary

* `Issue`
* `From stage / owner`
* `To stage / owner`
* `Objective`

## Inputs Received

* source Jira issue
* linked documents
* constraints
* known dependencies

## Outputs Produced

* artifacts created
* decisions made
* implementation or validation status

## Risks

* risk tier
* unresolved concerns
* failure modes to watch

## Open Questions

* unresolved product, UX, architecture, or operational questions

## Acceptance Criteria for Next Stage

* what the next stage is expected to validate or complete

## Evidence Links

* Jira issue
* Confluence page or ADR
* PR or branch
* test results
* screenshots or report outputs
